Top Analyst Predicts Apple Will Hit $4 Trillion First Followed By Nvidia — Says AI Demand Is 'Exploding' Despite Tariffs And DeepSeek Fears: 'The Bears Can't See AI In The Spreadsheets...'
data.description: Wedbush analyst Dan Ives predicts Apple will be the first company to reach a $4 trillion market cap, followed by Nvidia, emphasizing that AI demand is accelerating despite concerns over tariffs and DeepSeek competition.

data.title: Trump Warns Zelenskyy To Quickly Negotiate War's End With Russia Or Risk Losing Ukraine
data.description: President Donald Trump warned Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy on Wednesday to swiftly negotiate an end to Russia's invasion or face losing his country entirely.
